opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My head is throbbing right behind my eyes, I'm bumping into doorframes because I can't see out the sides, and my breasts have started leaking milk even though I'm not pregnant.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache suddenly got much worse over the last two days and now I keep missing things on both sides when I walk around — and the milk leaking is really scaring me.

symptom_narrative.onset: the headache has been there dully for a long time, but it flared up badly over the last 48 hours, and the trouble seeing to the sides came on around the same time
symptom_narrative.duration: chronic dull headache with a sudden bad flare over 2 days; side-vision trouble new over the last couple of days
symptom_narrative.character: throbbing pain behind and around both eyes; the milk leaking is spontaneous and also comes with light pressure
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the headache is severe and she is very frightened; she is terrified to walk around the house because she keeps clipping doorframes on both sides
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: behind and around both eyes at the front of the head; vision problem is on the far left and far right edges of what she can see
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: headache constant and worse over 2 days; vision loss constant since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; she took some paracetamol and ibuprofen which only took a little of the edge off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around the house is frightening because of the blind edges
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: milk leaking from both breasts, periods stopped about a year ago, no interest in sex, and she and her partner have been unable to conceive for two years; some gradual weight gain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the dull headache is long-standing but has never flared like this or come with vision loss before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too frightened to walk around unassisted because of the blind spots on both sides

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: periods stopped about 12 months ago and haven't come back
unable to fall pregnant despite trying for two years

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some today for the headache
took some today for the headache

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives independently; denies any regular prescribed medicines and specifically denies taking any tablets for mental-health conditions or nausea

objective_data_offered.value: on video, milky white discharge visible from both nipples, including with light pressure
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown on a phone camera; character and duct pattern cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: keeps bumping into doorframes on both the far left and far right; says she can't see things at the outer edges of both sides
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's subjective account; no formal visual-field testing possible over chat
